CustomField.description: jours restants avant la fin de la tâche
CustomField.formula: IF(ISBLANK(Date_de_fin__c), "⚪ Date de fin non définie", IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Date_debut__c)) && TODAY() < DATEVALUE(Date_debut__c), "📅 Pas encore commencé (Début le " & TEXT(DAY(DATEVALUE(Date_debut__c))) & "/" & TEXT(MONTH(DATEVALUE(Date_debut__c))) & ")", IF((DATEVALUE(Date_de_fin__c) - TODAY()) < 0, "🏁 𝐄́𝐂𝐇𝐄́𝐀𝐍𝐂𝐄 𝐃𝐄́𝐏𝐀𝐒𝐒𝐄́𝐄 (" & TEXT(ABS(DATEVALUE(Date_de_fin__c) - TODAY())) & " jours de retard)", IF((DATEVALUE(Date_de_fin__c) - TODAY()) = 0, "🚨 𝐃𝐄𝐑𝐍𝐈𝐄𝐑 𝐉𝐎𝐔𝐑 !", "⏳ 𝐉 — " & SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE( TEXT(DATEVALUE(Date_de_fin__c) - TODAY()), "0", "𝟎"), "1", "𝟏"), "2", "𝟐"), "3", "𝟑"), "4", "𝟒"), "5", "𝟓"), "6", "𝟔"), "7", "𝟕"), "8", "𝟖"), "9", "𝟗") & " 𝐚𝐯𝐚𝐧𝐭 𝐥𝐚 𝐟𝐢𝐧" ) ) ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: jours restants avant la fin de la tâche
CustomField.label: 🕒 Jours restants
